name: siteforge
description: Production-grade static site generator with AI content, drag-and-drop builder, and multi-platform deploy

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build:prod: cd client && npm install && npm run build
